zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brereton於1326年2月14日出生在英國爾艾格頓時，他的父親William Brereton32歲，母親Margery Bosley37歲。他於1349年與Ellen Helena Egerton在英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1346年登記服兵役。他去世於1398年在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利哈福勒爾享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Brereton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Brereton, in Cheshire and Staffordshire, and sometimes from Brearton in Yorkshire or Brierton in Durham. Brereton in Staffordshire is named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + Old English dūn ‘hill’ as its final element; the others are named with Old English brǣr, brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Brewerton
meanings: English: variant of   Brereton  , the result of confusion by folk etymology with the occupational name   Brewer  .

variants.name: Brierton
meanings: English: habitational name from Brierton in County Durham (formerly in Yorkshire) or Brearton in North Yorkshire, which are both named with Old English brēr ‘briar’ + tūn ‘farmstead’, or Brereton in Cheshire, which has the same origin (see Brereton ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brereton was born on 14 February 1326, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, his father, William Brereton, was 32 and his mother, Margery Bosley, was 37. He married Ellen Helena Egerton in 1349, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1346. He died in 1398, in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 72.

Il a épousé Ellen Helena Egerton en 1349, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1346. Il est décédé en 1398, à Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

Er hat 1349 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen Helena Egerton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1346 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1398 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich.

Lui sposato Ellen Helena Egerton nel 1349, nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1346. ja.lifeSummary: William Breretonが1326年2月14日にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父William Breretonは32歳，母Margery Bosleyは37歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでEllen Helena Egertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年に兵役登録をした。彼は1398年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメハーフレウルで72歳で死去した。

ko.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅
ko.lifeSummary: William Brereton(이)가 1326년 2월 14일 영국 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Brereton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Bosley(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 Ellen Helena Egerton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1398년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 하르플레우르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Brereton nasceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1326, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Brereton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margery Bosley, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Helena Egerton em 1349, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1346. Ele faleceu em 1398, em Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 72 anos.

ru.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brereton родился 14 февраля 1326 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Brereton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Bosley, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Helena Egerton в 1349 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1346 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1398 г. в местности харфлеур, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

Se casó con Ellen Helena Egerton en 1349, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1346. Murió en 1398, en Harfleur, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
